languages.text: {n}Бормоча под нос короткую молитву, Абеляр раскрывает набор хирургеона и склоняется над лежащей, но спустя минуту резко мотает головой.{/n} "Прошу меня извинить, Ваша Светлость, но всего моего опыта недостаточно, чтобы помочь с подобным. Нужен целый сонм хирургеонов и их ассистентов, чтобы залечить такие раны. Остается лишь молить {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}, чтобы Он даровал Ларии достойную смерть".

traits.locale_text: {n}Бормоча под нос короткую молитву, Абеляр раскрывает набор хирургеона и склоняется над лежащей, но спустя минуту резко мотает головой.{/n} "Прошу меня извинить, Ваша Светлость, но всего моего опыта недостаточно, чтобы помочь с подобным. Нужен целый сонм хирургеонов и их ассистентов, чтобы залечить такие раны. Остается лишь молить {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}, чтобы Он даровал Ларии достойную смерть".
traits.speaker: AbelardCompanion

languages.text: {n}Murmuring a short prayer under his breath, Abelard opens his chirurgeon's kit and bends over the prone figure, but after a minute he shakes his head sharply.{/n} "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but all my experience is not enough to help with such wounds. A whole host of chirurgeons and their assistants would be needed to heal these injuries. All we can do is pray to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} that He grant Laria a dignified death."
languages.original_text: {n}Бормоча под нос короткую молитву, Абеляр раскрывает набор хирургеона и склоняется над лежащей, но спустя минуту резко мотает головой.{/n} "Прошу меня извинить, Ваша Светлость, но всего моего опыта недостаточно, чтобы помочь с подобным. Нужен целый сонм хирургеонов и их ассистентов, чтобы залечить такие раны. Остается лишь молить {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}, чтобы Он даровал Ларии достойную смерть".

All that remains is to pray to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} that He grant Laria a worthy death."

languages.text: {n}阿贝拉德低声念了句简短的祷词，然后便打开船医包，俯身凑近那倒地的身体。但一分钟后，他猛地摇了摇头。{/n}“恕我无能，大人。凭我的经验不足以应对这种伤势。要治好她，需要一整队船医和助手才行。我们所能做的，唯有向{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}祈祷，求祂让菈丽雅体面地死去。”
languages.original_text: {n}Murmuring a short prayer under his breath, Abelard opens his chirurgeon's kit and bends over the prone figure, but after a minute he shakes his head sharply.{/n} "Forgive me, Your Lordship, but all my experience is not enough to help with such wounds. A whole host of chirurgeons and their assistants would be needed to heal these injuries. All we can do is pray to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} that He grant Laria a dignified death."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿贝拉德低声念了句简短的祷词，然后便打开船医包，俯身凑近那倒地的身体。但一分钟后，他猛地摇了摇头。{/n}“恕我无能，大人。凭我的经验不足以应对这种伤势。要治好她，需要一整队船医和助手才行。我们所能做的，唯有向{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}祈祷，求祂让菈丽雅体面地死去。”

languages.text: {n}Murmurando una breve plegaria, Abelard abre su equipo de cirugía y se inclina sobre la figura tendida, pero al cabo de un minuto niega bruscamente con la cabeza.{/n} «Le ruego que me perdone, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero ni con toda mi experiencia puedo tratar semejantes heridas. Necesitaríamos a una hueste entera de cirujanos y sus ayudantes para atenderlas. Solo podemos rezar al {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} que conceda una muerte piadosa a Laria».
languages.original_text: {n}Murmuring a short prayer under his breath, Abelard opens his chirurgeon's kit and bends over the prone figure, but after a minute he shakes his head sharply.{/n} "Forgive me, Your Lordship, but all my experience is not enough to help with such wounds. A whole host of chirurgeons and their assistants would be needed to heal these injuries. All we can do is pray to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} that He grant Laria a dignified death."

traits.locale_text: {n}Murmurando una breve plegaria, Abelard abre su equipo de cirugía y se inclina sobre la figura tendida, pero al cabo de un minuto niega bruscamente con la cabeza.{/n} «Le ruego que me perdone, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero ni con toda mi experiencia puedo tratar semejantes heridas. Necesitaríamos a una hueste entera de cirujanos y sus ayudantes para atenderlas. Solo podemos rezar al {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} que conceda una muerte piadosa a Laria».

languages.text: {n}Marmonnant une courte prière, Abélard ouvre sa trousse chirurgicale et se penche sur la silhouette prostrée, mais au bout de quelques instants, il secoue la tête fermement.{/n} « Pardonnez-moi, Votre Seigneurie, mais toute mon expertise ne suffira pas à soigner de telles blessures. Il faudrait tout un groupe de chirurgeons et d'assistants pour traiter ces lésions. Il ne nous reste qu'à prier l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} d'accorder à Laria une mort digne. »
languages.original_text: {n}Murmuring a short prayer under his breath, Abelard opens his chirurgeon's kit and bends over the prone figure, but after a minute he shakes his head sharply.{/n} "Forgive me, Your Lordship, but all my experience is not enough to help with such wounds. A whole host of chirurgeons and their assistants would be needed to heal these injuries. All we can do is pray to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} that He grant Laria a dignified death."

traits.locale_text: {n}Marmonnant une courte prière, Abélard ouvre sa trousse chirurgicale et se penche sur la silhouette prostrée, mais au bout de quelques instants, il secoue la tête fermement.{/n} « Pardonnez-moi, Votre Seigneurie, mais toute mon expertise ne suffira pas à soigner de telles blessures. Il faudrait tout un groupe de chirurgeons et d'assistants pour traiter ces lésions. Il ne nous reste qu'à prier l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} d'accorder à Laria une mort digne. »

languages.text: {n}Abelard, nefesinin altından kısa bir dua mırıldanarak cerrah çantasını açıyor ve yatan figürün üzerine eğiliyor ancak bir dakika sonra başını sertçe iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Üzgünüm ama tecrübem, böylesi yaralara yardım etmeye yetmez. Bu yaraları iyileştirmek için koca bir cerrah ordusu ve asistanları gerekli. Tek yapabileceğimiz, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} Laria'ya onurlu bir ölüm bahşetmesi için dua etmek."
languages.original_text: {n}Murmuring a short prayer under his breath, Abelard opens his chirurgeon's kit and bends over the prone figure, but after a minute he shakes his head sharply.{/n} "Forgive me, Your Lordship, but all my experience is not enough to help with such wounds. A whole host of chirurgeons and their assistants would be needed to heal these injuries. All we can do is pray to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} that He grant Laria a dignified death."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard, nefesinin altından kısa bir dua mırıldanarak cerrah çantasını açıyor ve yatan figürün üzerine eğiliyor ancak bir dakika sonra başını sertçe iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Üzgünüm ama tecrübem, böylesi yaralara yardım etmeye yetmez. Bu yaraları iyileştirmek için koca bir cerrah ordusu ve asistanları gerekli. Tek yapabileceğimiz, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} Laria'ya onurlu bir ölüm bahşetmesi için dua etmek."

languages.text: {n}Abelard murmelt ein kurzes Gebet, ehe er sein Chirurgeum-Kit öffnet und sich über die vor ihm liegende Frau beugt. Nach einer Minute schüttelt er allerdings den Kopf.{/n} "Verzeiht mir, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, aber all meine Erfahrung reicht nicht aus, um solche Wunden zu versorgen. Wir bräuchten eine ganze Horde von Chirurgeums und ihren Assistenten, um diese Verletzungen zu heilen. Wir können nur noch zum {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} beten, dass Er Laria einen würdevollen Tod gewährt."
languages.original_text: {n}Murmuring a short prayer under his breath, Abelard opens his chirurgeon's kit and bends over the prone figure, but after a minute he shakes his head sharply.{/n} "Forgive me, Your Lordship, but all my experience is not enough to help with such wounds. A whole host of chirurgeons and their assistants would be needed to heal these injuries. All we can do is pray to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} that He grant Laria a dignified death."

traits.locale_text: {n}Abelard murmelt ein kurzes Gebet, ehe er sein Chirurgeum-Kit öffnet und sich über die vor ihm liegende Frau beugt. Nach einer Minute schüttelt er allerdings den Kopf.{/n} "Verzeiht mir, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, aber all meine Erfahrung reicht nicht aus, um solche Wunden zu versorgen. Wir bräuchten eine ganze Horde von Chirurgeums und ihren Assistenten, um diese Verletzungen zu heilen. Wir können nur noch zum {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} beten, dass Er Laria einen würdevollen Tod gewährt."

languages.text: {n}アベラールは短い祈りをささやき、外科医の道具を取り出し、倒れているリアリアの体を覆うように身を寄せた。しかし、1分後、彼は首を激しく振った。{/n}「申し訳ありません、{mf|閣下|閣下}。私の経験では、このような傷を治すことはできません。数多くの外科医と助手が必要でしょう。私たちができることは、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神帝{/g}がリアリアに尊厳ある死を与えてくれることを祈ることだけです。」
languages.original_text: {n}Murmuring a short prayer under his breath, Abelard opens his chirurgeon's kit and bends over the prone figure, but after a minute he shakes his head sharply.{/n} "Forgive me, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, but all my experience is not enough to help with such wounds. A whole host of chirurgeons and their assistants would be needed to heal these injuries. All we can do is pray to the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} that He grant Laria a dignified death."
